logger.doc:name: Before calling tracation does not exist email implimentation flow
logger.message: ============Before calling tracation does not exist email implimentation flow=========

flow-ref.doc:name: calling transactions does not exist email implimentation flow
flow-ref.name: get_transactions_doesnot_exit_email_implimentationFlow

logger.doc:name: Response fromm transaction does not exist email implimentation flow
logger.message: ==========Response fromm transaction does not exist email implimentation flow=========

ee:transform.doc:name: account does not exist in database

logger.doc:name: The customer account deatils does not existed in DB
logger.message: ----------------------------The customer account deatils does not existed in DB--------------------------

logger.doc:name: Before calling tracation database implimentation flow

flow-ref.doc:name: calling transaction database to retrive transactions for the user account
flow-ref.name: get_transaction_database_data_flow

logger.doc:name: Response recieved from the tracation database implimentation flow
logger.message: ==========Response recieved from the tracation database implimentation flow=========

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { payloadType: typeOf(payload), payload: payload }

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "SUCCESS", statusCode: 200, transactions: vars.db map (row) -> { accountNumber: row.ACCOUNTNUMBER, transactionType: row.TRANSACTIONTYPE, amount: row.AMOUNT, balance: row.BALANCE, timestamp: row.TIMESTAMP } }]

logger.doc:name: Before calling tracation email implimentation flow
response recieved from tracation email implimentation flow
logger.message: =============response recieved from tracation email implimentation flow========
